title: Sync script works by hand, fails silently under cron
description_md:
`/opt/scripts/sync-data.sh` runs perfectly when you execute it directly, but the scheduled cron job for it (`/etc/cron.d/sync-job`) never actually produces its output. SSH in as `trainee` (passwordless `sudo`), work out why the exact same script behaves differently under cron, and fix it.

You're done when the job succeeds run the way cron itself would run it (not just when you run it by hand).
